vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current visual data. The pots contain soil and debris, but no identifiable foliage corresponding to the P1-P4 registry.

inventory_reconciliation.P1_String_of_Nickels: Systemic Loss: Pot is present but contains no visible plant matter.
inventory_reconciliation.P2_Mexican_Mint: Systemic Loss: Pot is present but contains no visible plant matter.
inventory_reconciliation.P3_Pothos: Systemic Loss: Pot is present; the white rabbit anchor is missing or obscured; no foliage detected.
inventory_reconciliation.P4_Silver_Guest: Systemic Loss: No evidence of the specimen.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface, no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface, no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface, no signs of life.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Pot: Not identified as a distinct entity in the current frame.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all visible pots.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, fragmented material (resembling crushed eggshells) on the surface of the black pot.
biome_observations.desk_surface: A white cylindrical object (likely a bottle or container) is present in the later images, acting as a new intervention.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-5: Introduction of a metallic spoon in the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t-5_to_t-3: Removal of the spoon; introduction of a white cylindrical object near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t-3_to_current: The white object remains; no plant growth observed throughout the sequence.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: All specimens are in a state of total systemic failure. There is no photosynthetic activity or structural integrity observed in any of the pots.
anomalies: Introduction of a white cylindrical container (T-4 to Current)
Presence of white granular debris (eggshells) on soil surface
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical audit reveals a complete absence of the registered plant life. The pots are currently serving as containers for soil and miscellaneous debris. The environment appears to be static with no signs of germination or recovery. The 'white rabbit' anchor is not visible in the current frame, suggesting it may have been removed or buried.
